title: MathWorld
body: MathWorld is an online mathematics reference work, created and largely written by Eric W. Weisstein. It is sponsored by and licensed to Wolfram Research, Inc. and was partially funded by the National Science Foundation's National Science Digital Library grant to the University of Illinois at Urbana–Champaign.
categories: Articles lacking reliable references from July 2017
Articles with unsourced statements from April 2023
Short description is different from Wikidata
